title: ornithogalum umbellatum var. minus
intro: Ornithogalum umbellatum var. minus, also known as the lesser star of Bethlehem, is a flowering plant species in the Asparagaceae family, characterized by its white, bell-shaped flowers and strap-like leaves. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Ornithogalum umbellatum var. minus include its potential to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, although its use should be approached with caution due to potential side effects and interactions with other medications.
